payload.answer: I can’t remember everything about AI as a durable personal memory. Please specify what AI-related fact, preference, goal, project, or context you want saved.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is overly broad and does not provide a specific durable personal fact, preference, relationship, event, or project to remember.

details: No memory was stored because the request was too broad and not specific enough to form a durable memory.

repair_options: Remember that I am interested in artificial intelligence.
Remember that I am learning about AI.
Remember that I prefer explanations about AI to be concise.
Remember that I am working on an AI-related project: [project details].
Remember this specific AI topic I care about: [topic].
